subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024), sorted in descending order by average cost per seat

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask (sql_gen, mid tier) is sufficient. The query requires aggregation across a likely single contract/usage fact table with filtering (Q4 2024 dates), grouping by product, and calculating a derived metric (average cost/active seats). This involves multi-row aggregation and sorting—standard mid-complexity SQL work. No reconciliation or policy decision needed. Mid tier handles the joins and aggregation reliably without frontier-level complexity.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC
